import asyncio
import json
from concurrent.futures import ProcessPoolExecutor

executor = ProcessPoolExecutor()


async def handle_request(data: bytes) -> dict:
    parsed = json.loads(data)
    
    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
    enriched = await loop.run_in_executor(
        executor, lambda: [heavy_computation(item) for item in parsed["items"]]
    )
    
    return {"results": enriched}


async def process_batch(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
    
    def _process():
        results = []
        for item in items:
            embedding = compute_embedding(item["text"])
            score = compute_similarity(embedding, item["target"])
            results.append({**item, "score": score})
        return results
    
    return await loop.run_in_executor(executor, _process)


async def transform_payload(payload: dict) -> bytes:
    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
    return await loop.run_in_executor(executor, _encrypt_payload, payload)


def _encrypt_payload(payload: dict) -> bytes:
    validated = validate_schema(payload)
    compressed = compress_data(validated)
    return encrypt(compressed)
